sections.paragraph:
- Original: καύχημα

- Transliteration: Kauchema

- Phonetic: kow'-khay-mah

- Definition:

1. that of which one glories or can glory, matter or ground of glorying

2. a glorying or boasting

- Origin: from G2744

- TDNT entry: 13:45,4

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: From G2744; a boast (properly the objective; by implication the act) in a good or bad sense: - boasting (whereof) to glory (of) glorying rejoice (-ing).
